channel.title: LLM Works Blog
channel.description: Technical writing on AI infrastructure, agent development, and fine-tuning.

item.title: Agent Release: llm-news — AI-Curated Tech News
item.description: An AI news curation service that monitors 50+ sources, summarizes and rates articles, clusters them into themes, and produces daily digests — all running on a local 14B model.

item.title: A Verb Layer for Agent-LLM Communication
item.description: Agents are code that interacts with LLMs. LLMs speak free-form text. How should this communication be structured? Current approaches, trade-offs, and what we're building.

item.title: Why I'm Building Agent Infrastructure
item.description: Agents today don't learn from experience. The missing piece isn't better models—it's the integration layer that connects inference, training, and deployment into a learning loop.

item.title: Qwen 3B Fine-Tuning Beats Claude Haiku: Scaling Curve 0.5B-72B
item.description: Fine-tuned Qwen 3B outperforms Claude Haiku on constrained generation. Full scaling curve from 0.5B to 72B with SFT+DPO shows the quality cliff.
